title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Sentomaru, Unknown person #9, Marines, Luffy, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Sentomaru
dialogue.text: What Happened!? The Pacifistas have stopped guarding!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But no one is beyond our authority ranking...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: to the Marine Soldiers inside the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lower-ranking officers are not allowed to see him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "GOROSE!!? Have they come to this island!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Anyway, let's run! Hold on tight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Someone is coming out of that circle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What the hell is that? A monster?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know, but that thing is most likely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The world's surface... it's been a while....!!
